analysis: Quiet board. Digest big-ticket lane is grade-inflated — Twisted buckler's A- verifies as a +0.3% edge with a non-reaching buy leg (0/3), below the after-tax bar. Small-ticket fill-now rows (Searing page, Antidote++) reach but net is thin. No new verified edge worth deploying into; holding the resting fang/blowpipe sells.
